title: Seafront Holiday Park Kangaroo Island
description: Contemporary rooms and apartments offering balconies and free Wi-Fi, plus a pool and mini-golf.
hotelDescription:
This hotel occupies a low-rise building and individual villas, a minutes' walk away from the beach, 4 minutes' walk from the ferry port and 7 minutes' walk from Baudin Conservation Park.
 The simple, contemporary rooms and villa apartments come with balconies and en suite bathrooms. They offer free Wi-Fi and flat-screen TVs, plus minibars, tea and coffeemakers, and minifridges. The 1- to 3-bedroom apartments add private entrances, kitchenettes with microwaves, and living rooms.
 Amenities include an outdoor pool, a sauna and a mini-golf course. Also on-site is a caravan/camping park.
